info.title: Tehran House Prices Dataset
info.subtitle: Insights into Tehran's Real Estate Market: Analyzing Property Prices and Trends
info.description: This dataset contains information on residential property prices in **Tehran**, scraped from the **Divar** site. It includes features such as Price (USD), Price (IRR), Area, Room, Parking, Warehouse, Elevator availability, Address, and more. The data is intended for analyzing housing market trends and price predictions in Tehran's real estate sector.
